nasb.text: For he adds rebellion to his sin; He claps his hands among us, And multiplies his words against God.’ ”

esv.text: For he adds rebellion to his sin; he claps his hands among us and multiplies his words against God.”

cnv.text: 他在自己的罪上又加過犯， 在我們中間鼓掌嘲笑　神， 用許多話敵對　神。”

ccb.text: 他的叛逆使他罪上加罪， 他在我们中间拍手讥笑， 用许多话亵渎上帝。”
